title: Mahindra Garden Route nominated – Let’s celebrate with hero deals!
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Exciting news - Mahindra Garden Route has been nominated for Motoring: Best New Car Dealership in the 2025 Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards!


> This nomination belongs to every customer and team member who has supported our journey.


Your belief in Mahindra and in us as your trusted dealership is what brought us here. And what’s a celebration without a bit of Mahindra flair?

Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/

To mark the occasion, we’ve introduced limited-time Hero Deals across our rugged and reliable line-up. Whether you're farming, adventuring, or just living life to the fullest, we’ve got a Mahindra that suits your world. We invite you to pop in, grab a deal, and celebrate this honour with us.

Visit our website here.

Let’s go the distance, Garden Route - together!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
